textByHashes.e9e6143bcbdacb6545f9cf9e3131f24ee6acc7d4: Squawk! Leave me alone, bird! I'm trying to have a drink!
textByHashes.a63f1060e594d95b4d2edf6eac094929f42c226f: Squawk! She's pecking my peg leg!
textByHashes.fb8f1d609c2f0451c5740b06a33c38e39f449f95: Squawk! Ow! That was my finger! Stupid bird!
textByHashes.29475e9c55255b61d9f8c5df6c7e19dfe9046131: Squawk! Steve! That bird is trying to drink the grog again!
textByHashes.4c48d0ff312d5474ef519ba26d4cf9d8cd67881f: Squawk! Please stop! I'm sorry I called you a pigeon!
